feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom extraction enabled CDS views in S/4HANA 2023 on premise
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, Happy Friday,

We are implementing on premise S/4 HANA 2023: See system config attached.

As we have some 3rd party applications in S/4 Development System, there is also the need to build custom extractors for e.g. load to existing BW/4 and we planned to use extraction enabled CDS views in S/4:

  • We only find online documentation to implement custom extraction enabled CDS based on defineView
  • As we see from latest developments, defineView is not the state-of-the-art solution and will become obsolete as by AS ABAP 7.57, see attachments.
  • Is there any future proofed way to build in S/4 HANA 2023 (on premise) custom extraction enabled CDS views (using defineViewEntity or similar)?  

Thanks a lot for your feedbacks, links and material upfront!

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Not able to locate sap:updatable or sap:creatable tags in metadata for SAP S/4HANA OData V4 APIs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For any OData V4 APIs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud or On-premise, when we query for the $metadata for any service, we do not find these tags anymore: sap:creatable, sap:updatable, sap:delectable, etc to know if each entityset or field/property within an entity is supported for these operations or not.

Have we changed the mechanism to check this information on the compatibility? 

Would be really helpful if someone in SAP S/4HANA product team can help us in answering this question since we are unable to know that which all fields supports what all operations within an entity by looking at the metadata which was pretty much clear in OData V2 APIs. @SAPSupport 

Regards,

Sidhant Mahajan

entry.title: Purchasing Condition Contract
entry.content:
Business is looking for settlement in condition contract in purchasing for manufacturer price and distributor price also. Please advise


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S_ALR_87013611 Report Painter report to Internal Table
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

  Im trying to run the standard report s_alr_87013611 in my abap program using submit to get the data in an internal table, but as a result the report is executed and data not returned. 

kindly review the attached code and suggest solutions

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZZ_COSTCENTER_3611
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT ZZ_COSTCENTER_3611.

TABLES: CSKS, CSKA.

**SALV[
***********************************************************************
**   Global References for Classes                                    **
************************************************************************
 DATA: gr_table     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
 DATA: gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions_list.
* DATA: gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions.
 DATA: gr_display   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_display_settings.
 DATA: gr_columns   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table.
 DATA: gr_column    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.
 DATA: gr_sorts     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_sorts.
 DATA: gr_agg       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_aggregations.
 DATA: gr_layout    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_layout.
 DATA: r_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.
 DATA: rs_selfield TYPE slis_selfield.
 DATA: r_ucomm LIKE sy-ucomm.
 DATA: oref TYPE REF TO cx_root,
       text TYPE string.

************************************************************************
**   Data Declarations                                                **
************************************************************************
 DATA: it_spfli TYPE TABLE OF spfli.
 DATA: lv_key   TYPE salv_s_layout_key.

**get_layout[
 DATA:set_lay   TYPE slis_vari,
     g_exit    TYPE c,
     g_variant TYPE disvariant.
**get_layout]
**SALV]

** define data for SUBMIT Return
DATA: go_data TYPE REF TO data.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS: <gt_data> TYPE ANY TABLE.

SELECTION-SCREEN begin of BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME title text-000.  "Selection Values

*select-OPTIONS: s_ebeln for ekko-ebeln.
  PARAMETERS: pKOKRS TYPE KOKRS OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000',  "Company Code
            pGJAHR TYPE GJAHR OBLIGATORY ,                   " Fiscal Year
            pPERBL_F TYPE PERBL,                             " period low
            pPERBL_T TYPE PERBL,                           "period high
            pVERSN TYPE VERSN OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '0'.      "plan version

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.


SELECTION-SCREEN begin of BLOCK B2 WITH FRAME title text-001.   "Selection Group

PARAMETERS: pKSGRU TYPE KSGRU. "cost center Group
PARAMETERS: p_KOSTL TYPE CSKS-KOSTL NO-DISPLAY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: so_kostl FOR p_kostl.

PARAMETERS: pKAGRU TYPE KAGRU  "Cost element group
               .

PARAMETERS: p_kstar TYPE CSKA-KSTAR NO-DISPLAY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: so_kstar for p_kstar.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B2.

START-OF-SELECTION.

      "Set SALV grid output parameters so the report executed in background
   cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set( EXPORTING display  = abap_false
                                        metadata = abap_false
                                        data     = abap_true ).

    SUBMIT GP4QLQKH46VZJ3P1A40A23S3HJG300
*      EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
          WITH $1KOKRE EQ pkokrs
          WITH $1GJAHR EQ pgjahr
          WITH $1PERIV EQ pperbl_f
          WITH $1PERIB EQ pperbl_t
          WITH $1VERP EQ pversn
          WITH $1KOSET EQ pksgru
          WITH _1KOSET IN so_kostl
          WITH $1KSTAR EQ pKAGRU
          WITH _1KSTAR IN so_kstar
    AND RETURN
    .
"Get data from s_alr_87013611
  TRY.
      cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref(
        IMPORTING r_data = go_data ).
      ASSIGN go_data->* TO <gt_data>.

      "Keep FBL1N data into internal table
*      IF <gt_data> IS ASSIGNED.
*        LOOP AT <gt_data> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_data>).
*          MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_data> TO WA_FBL3N.
*          WA_FBL3N-source = 'FBL3N'.
*          APPEND WA_FBL3N TO IT_FBL3N.
*        ENDLOOP.
*      ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info ##NO_HANDLER.
      MESSAGE 'Unable to retrieve ALV data' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.

entry.title: Method to automate Change of Storage location in Process order
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Please guide me how to automate the process of Changing of Storage location in Process order after certain bussines transaction.

Primarliy this to change the reservation from the Store sloc to Shopfloor Sloc.

I beilve LSMW and BDC will not be good idea.

Please help SAP S/4HANA Industrial Manufacturing

entry.title: Insights on SAP vs Oracle
entry.content:
I'm working on a new project for a large corporation (manufacturing and distribution) to evaluate potential ERP solutions. I’m new to this topic and I was asked by my manager to help get it started.

I've been looking at all sorts of research and I'm eager to gain real-world perspectives from experienced professionals in the field.

I'm interested in the main insights of SAP vs Oracle:

  • What are the advantages and disadvantages encountered with SAP and Oracle in large-scale deployments? 
  • Are there particular functionalities where one performs better over the other?
  • Cost is a major factor. Can anyone share experiences regarding implementation timelines and ongoing maintenance expenses for both?

What other questions should I be asking? 

Thanks in advance for sharing your valuable knowledge!

Noa

entry.title: EHS Data Migration for SAP S/4hana on-premise
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to migrate the data of the EHS module in the S/4hana on-premise system using the staging table method—data such as chemical substance, risk, control, and compliance requirements for OEL. There is no standard template for these data in the Migration Cockpit app. I would be grateful if anyone has a solution for this problem.

Regards

entry.title: expiration date - open coli
entry.content:
For specific raw materials there is an expiration date in the system, which reflects the expiration date for a coli which have not been opened. When the coli has been opened the expiration date is reduced. So in a planning scenario it will be difficult to estimate how much to purchase, which depends on if the open coli can be used in process orders before it expire.

How to control this in SAP?

Br. sune

entry.title: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

This has reference to our production environment (PEW) where incoming Loading End and Departure messages for FO is coming almost at the same time from EWM-->TM.

Loading End was reported at 10:12:39 and Departure was reported at 10:12:50.

Can you please help us to know if there exists an identifier using which we would be able to differentiate a Loading End message with Departure message.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Stock Room Management and SAP TM in S/4HANA
entry.content: Dear all, an Integration between SAP LE-TRA and Stock Room Management is possible in my eyes at the moment in S/4HANA. But after 2030 when SAP stop the support of LE-TRA, then there is not integration anymore with Stock Room Managment. What should the client do? Is an integration between SAP TM and Stock Room Management in S/4HANA possible? If yes, how is this possible between both Systems?

entry.title: Cancel Call Object in the Maintenance Plan with No Shift
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have an issue with scheduling plan dates for call objects in the Maintenance Plan. The call object is notification, Shift factor is 100% and the Completion Requirement is ticked. In this scenario, the notification is a routine alarm.

The routine may not be performed on the planned date. In this case, the notification needs to be closed (Canceled), but the planned date of the next call object should not change (not shift). Is there a standard solution for this?

Regards

entry.title: Release Value not updated in Value Contract when sales order referenced
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have value contract with item category TAD (service value contract) with (Target value is 100.000) . 

When refering sales order to it (80.000) , released value is not updated , even after invoice creation .

Please , is there any important configuration I missed ?

VTAA

 VOV7

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Unable to add Reference object
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

i am trying to create a "custom inbound API in S/4 hana". i am following the below documentation link, "https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/s4hc-abap-environment-create-custom-api.html"   however when i come to the 2nd steps after completing the perquisites i am facing below issue is eclipse. I have attached the screen shot below for your reference. please advise how to proceed.

entry.title: Back To Standard - S/4HANA Upgrade Technical Brownfield Conversion)
entry.content:
Our organization is in the process of planning the S/4HANA Brownfield technical Upgrade.

Questions 1 - Are there any SAP resources available pertaining to Back to Standard for S/4HANA Brownfield technical upgrade?

Questions 2 - Are there any SAP resources available pertaining to Back to Standard for S/4HANA Greenfield technical upgrade?

Any relevant info would be helpful. 

Thank you

entry.title: Committed Quantity field allow to add information after Goods Receipt on StO
entry.content:
Hello,

     We have a situation where end users are entering new entry for Committed Quantity under Delivery Schedule tab on STO. This is causing issues for ATP for future STOs. Is there anyway to freeze / gray out Committed Quantity field once Outbound Delivery is created for STO?

Thank you

Ankit

entry.title: SAP GUI Sunset
entry.content:
Subject: SAP GUI sunset

Description: As SAP is suggesting to move from GUI to Fiori applications. Even after moving everything to Fiori, do we still have access to SAP GUI for users who do not wish to move to Fiori. Need a clarity on SAP GUI Sunset if so any. I have tried to see if a SAP NOTE exists on this case, could not find any. Please suggest.

entry.title: Standard planning strategy 50
entry.content:
I want to use the standard planning strategy 50, but it was deleted from the system. It no longer appears in transactions OVZH and OVZG.

How can I recover the deleted standard strategy or recreate it from scratch?"

entry.title: how to hide any tab of header or Item in Sals document and Billing document in SAP
entry.content:
Hi 

Is there any way to hide the Condition tab for certain users in SAP sales order and Billing document  ( header /Item  level).

If yes, what is the standard Solution -

Best Regards

Sardar

entry.title: Batch split error as stock is not available for material and batch for VL02N
SAP Subscription Billing
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question about uploading the customer details into SAP using Data Migration Cockpit for a customer who has Subscription Billing solution in place.

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, SAP Subscription Billing and Event Broker for the replications.

There is this Data Migration Cockpit Templates with SAP S/4. If we are having Subscription Billing solution for a project and customer created in Sub Bill and replicated in S/4. How do we approach loading the customers from their current system to SAP? Should all customers be loaded into Sub Bill first then replicated that into S/4 or directly feed in SAP S/4 via data migration template?

If we are using the data migration template for Customer directly to load data into S/4 is there a way to replicate that in Subscription Billing? Is the replication being unidirectional or bidirectional?

Please Advise.

@stefan_kiene SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP Sales Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Please advise.

Thanks,

Brinda S
